mainEntity.name: What if employer forces return to work too soon Farmington?
mainEntity.text: What if employer forces return to work too soon Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Refuse unsafe duty; get doctor release. File modification request if unable to work.

suggestedAnswer.text: Farmington: light duty ok if suitable. Pushback via attorney prevents re-injury, preserves benefits. Retaliation risk high—document refusals.

name: Early Return to Work Farmington
description: Refuse unsafe duty; get doctor release. File modification request if unable to work.
